summary: First-pass full-stack testing of FATELYN prototype. Backend: 6/6 pytest passing (health, checkout monthly/yearly, invalid plan 400, confirm succeeded, quest graceful, history). Frontend: landing loads with branding + Explorer/Seeker/Luminary pricing; nav-prototype-btn and nav-showcase-link route correctly. Prototype /prototype renders all 15 screens via left navigator (15/15 clicked without error). Dashboard quick-actions functional, Chart 7/8 tab keys verified, Quest AI gracefully falls back (LLM budget exhausted upstream — acceptable), Subscription -> Payment sandbox flow completes end-to-end showing 'Welcome to Luminary'. Showcase gallery renders all screens. Zero console/React errors on any route.
action_items: Spec vs code selector-name mismatch (minor, not a bug): review-request lists 'dash-quick-friends' and 'dash-quick-yearly', but code (mockData.DASH_QUICK) uses keys 'compat' and 'year' -> selectors are 'dash-quick-compat' and 'dash-quick-year'. Same buttons exist and route correctly to friends/yearly screens. Either update spec or rename keys for consistency.
Spec vs code selector-name mismatch (minor): review-request expected 'chart-tab-sadesati' but toLowerCase().replace(/\s/g,'-') produces 'chart-tab-sade-sati'. Tab exists and renders correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/frontend/src/components/screens.jsx is 1002 lines — consider splitting into per-screen files for maintainability before Flutter handoff.
Backend Quest endpoint returns raw exception string in HTTPException detail (line 108); acceptable for prototype but should sanitize before production.
Payment/subscription endpoints are correctly documented as MOCKED sandbox flow (no real Stripe); publishable_key is Stripe's canonical test key.
test_credentials: N/A - no auth flow in prototype
seed_data_creation: None; test data prefixed TEST_ in checkout payloads
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 15 screens navigate cleanly. Dashboard quick-action keys are chart/compat/quest/year (NOT friends/yearly). Chart tab selectors use kebab-case: chart-tab-sade-sati (not sadesati). Payment sandbox flow fully completes without real Stripe. Quest may return 502 (LLM budget) — UI must show fallback (verified working).
